Featured Projects

01 / 03
Logistics Operations Database Analysis

Analyzed a real-world logistics database across 14 interconnected tables covering 85,000+ trips and 171,000+ deliveries. Built a comprehensive Power BI reporting suite from raw ETL to executive dashboards.

Built 6 interactive dashboards: executive overview, driver performance, fleet & maintenance, route & fuel, safety, and key insights
Uncovered 55.56% on-time delivery rate vs. 95% industry standard — a critical gap for operations leadership
Identified $95.59M in fuel costs representing 32% of total revenue
Authored 25+ custom DAX measures for dynamic KPI tracking
Power BI DAX Power Query Data Modeling ETL KPI Reporting

02 / 03
Sales Performance Intelligence Dashboard

Integrated multi-source sales data (Sales, Products, Customers) into a unified Power BI dashboard to track revenue, profitability, and customer growth across demographics and time periods.

Designed a relational data schema connecting Sales, Products, and Customer tables for cross-dimensional analysis
Built DAX measures to track Total Revenue, Total Cost, and Profit Margins dynamically
Identified the most profitable customer demographics by income level
Visualized monthly customer growth trends to detect seasonal performance patterns
Power BI DAX Power Query Revenue Analysis Trend Analysis

03 / 03
Retail Sales Performance Analysis

Analyzed 2,000+ rows of regional retail sales data across four Nigerian territories using advanced Excel techniques to build an automated reporting dashboard for business decision-making.

Designed an automated dashboard with Pivot Tables and Slicers — filterable by Region and Product Category
Identified "Laptop A13" as the top profit driver and top-performing sales representative through revenue analysis
Visualized COGS across Lagos, Abuja, Kano, and Port Harcourt for regional efficiency tracking
Automated KPI calculations, significantly cutting time spent on performance reviews
Microsoft Excel Pivot Tables Dashboard Design Regional Analysis COGS Analysis

Capabilities

Technical Skills

📊
Power BI

DAX measures, Power Query transformations, data modeling, and interactive dashboard design with slicers and drill-throughs.

🗄️
SQL & Python

Writing queries to extract, filter, and join large datasets. Python for data manipulation and analysis workflows.

📑
Microsoft Excel

Advanced formulas, Pivot Tables, Slicers, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, Macros, and automated KPI dashboards.

🔄
ETL & Data Cleaning

End-to-end data pipeline experience — raw extraction, transformation, and loading into analytics-ready models.

📈
Data Modeling

Building relational schemas, connecting multi-source tables, and designing star schemas for BI tools.

🎯
KPI Reporting

Defining, tracking, and communicating business-critical metrics through dynamic, executive-ready reports.

Background

About Me

I'm a Data Analyst based in Lagos, Nigeria, with a background in Mathematics and a specialization in Business Intelligence and data analytics.

My work focuses on making data useful, readable, and actionable — not just technically correct. Whether it's uncovering operational inefficiencies in a logistics database or identifying your top revenue segments, I build solutions that help teams make better decisions faster.

I recently completed an intensive Data Analytics program at TS Academy, where I worked on real-world datasets and built end-to-end BI solutions using Power BI, SQL, and Excel.

Location Lagos, Nigeria
Availability Open to Data Analyst internships and Entry-level roles
Work Setting Remote · Hybrid · Onsite
Education B.Sc.(Ed) Mathematics — OSUN STATE UNIVERSITY
Certification Data Analytics — TS Academy
Primary Tools Power BI · SQL · Excel
Focus BI Dashboards · KPI Reporting
